title: St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli
tagline: St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli — spiritual town of Karnataka

overview.short: St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli is a much-loved spiritual town in Karnataka, known for temples and pilgrimage.
overview.description: St. Anthony's Basilica in Dornahalli, Karnataka is a Catholic shrine dedicated to St. Anthony of Padua. Around 200 years ago, a farmer ploughing his field in Dornahalli unearthed a wooden statue of St.

topPlaces.name: Hosaramanahalli
topPlaces.description: Hosaramanahalli is a village located in the Mysore district of Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Lakshmana Tirtha
topPlaces.description: The Lakshmana Tirtha (Lakshmantīrtha River) is a river of Karnataka, India. It rises in Kodagu district and flows eastward.

topPlaces.name: Krishnarajanagara
topPlaces.description: Krishnarajanagara is a town in Mysore district in the Indian state of Karnataka. It is also the administrative center of Krishnarajanagara Taluk.

topPlaces.name: Krishnarajasagara
topPlaces.description: Krishnarajasagara is a town in Mandya district in the Indian state of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Arakeshwara Temple, Haleyedatore
topPlaces.description: Hale Yedatore, a village in the Krishnaraja Nagara taluk of the Mysore district, Karnataka state, India is located about four kilometers north of the commercially important newly built town of Krishnarajanagara, and about 44 km north-west of the historically important city of Mysore. The name Yedatore derives from two Kannada language words, yeda (lit, "left") and tore (lit, "river") – a name that arises from the "bend to the left" made by the river at that spot which is considered sacred by Hindus.

topPlaces.name: Gommatagiri
topPlaces.description: Gommatagiri is about 20 km from Mysore. Gommatagiri is situated in Bilikere hobli of Hunsur taluk in Mysore district in Karnataka state, India.

topPlaces.name: Bilikere, Mysore
topPlaces.description: Bilikere is a small town in Hunsur taluk of Mysore district in the Indian state of Karnataka.

topPlaces.name: Arabithittu Wildlife Sanctuary
topPlaces.description: Arabithittu Wildlife Sanctuary is located in the Mysore district of Karnataka, India. It was declared as a wildlife sanctuary on 30 April 1985.

The name Yedatore derives from two Kannada language words, yeda (lit, "left") and tore (lit, "river") – a name that arises from the "bend to the left" made by the river at that spot which is considered sacred by Hindus.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli?
faq.a: The best time to visit St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Mysuru Airport (32 km) and the nearest railway station is Mysuru Junction (26 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli?
faq.a: Stays in St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in St. Anthony's Basilica, Dornahalli?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hosaramanahalli, Lakshmana Tirtha, Krishnarajanagara, Krishnarajasagara, Arakeshwara Temple, Haleyedatore.
